{{CargoOrgan
|name=Humanform Signal
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10722
|idx=37
|description="...Warrior of Light No.7 showed no signs of life. Experiment Result: Time spent on Earth increased by 5%, and HP decreased by 30%."
— Star of Light Report
|skill=Before round start, activate Light Ray and lower enemy's DEF by 36%!
|hp=1210
|def=164
|atk=193
|rush=153
|gene1=During exploration, Fire DMG +120
|gene2=In explorations, {race} DEF +80
|gene3=In explorations, {race} ATK +80
|gene4=Fire DMG +1%
|gene7=Fire DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
